Information about Analyze Assist, and instructions for downloading, installing, and running Analyze Assist.{% endblock %} {% block keywords %}introduction, analysis, TM, translation, memory, Felix, TMX, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, HTML, XML, free, manual, help, documentation{% endblock %} {% block content %}

Getting Started

Analyze Assist is XXX.

Download and Install

Download the latest version of Analyze Assist from the Analyze Assist Website. Once you've downloaded the installer, double click on it and follow the on-screen instructions to install the program.

Starting Analyze Assist

If you selected to add a shortcut to the desktop, there'll be an "Analyze Assist" icon on your desktop. Double click on the icon to start the program.
